sizing_rule.note: Constrained tangent portfolio optimization deriving component weights (53.45%, 25.53%, 21.02%) that sum to 1.00, maximizing risk-adjusted returns. Weights are derived from optimal f framework applied to multi-component portfolio allocation rather than single-trade sizing.

source_rule_text: Allocate portfolio weights to multiple components based on constrained tangent portfolio optimization that maximizes risk-adjusted returns while maintaining weights that sum to 1.00.
